title: EQ - Select a value, kill the app, reopen it - the selected value persists
scenario: Verify that the selected EQ value persists after killing and reopening the app for all EQ options (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
steps: 1. Open the app and navigate to the EQ settings.
2. Select an EQ value (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ).
3. Kill the app (force close it from the app switcher or device settings).
5. Navigate back to the EQ settings.
6. Verify that the previously selected EQ value is still selected.
7. Repeat steps 1-6 for each possible EQ value (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
expected: The selected EQ value persists after killing and reopening the app for all EQ values (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
